race.comment: ASARKA (9) will find this easier than what he's been racing in recently, but the form stacks up in a race of this quality. Catarino's claim sees him down in the weights and he maps well here. Hasn't won for a while but this presents as a great chance to end his winning drought. MISS WALL STREET (1) comes back to this level which looks a good move on what she's done recently. Back to this grade can see him improve and the claim of Webster is a big tick. The inside draw should see her close to the speed and a return to her best form can see her right in the finish. PRINCE TIKEA (3) improved sharply last start as they took up the running over this course and distance. Suspect Martinan will adopt similar tactics and if he can run up to that performance again, he'll be hard to hold out. NORMA STARS (8) was better last start and she's in the mix on that effort. LAKEVIEW LIGHTNING (7) is next best.
